Package org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    LinearFeature
    This interface represents all object from the figure API that may be represented bu a linear feature (line, spline...).
    ModelObjectView<M extends ModelObject>
    This interface represents the model element figures.
    ViewComponent
    This interface represents a component of a view.
    ViewComponentBindingListener
    Listener on figure creation and removal.
    ViewComponentChangeListener
    Event of a change in the view component.
    ViewComponentConstants
    Constants for all the view components.
    ViewComponentContainer<C extends ViewComponent,G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
    Container of view components.
    ViewComponentLayoutListener
    Listener on repaint requests.
    ViewComponentModelChangeListener
    Event of a change in the view component.
    ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener
    Event of a change in the view component.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractViewComponent
    This class is the base class for all the drawable components.
    ViewComponentChangeEvent
    Event of a change in the view component.
    ViewComponentModelChangeEvent
    Event of a change in the view component.
    ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent
    Event of a change in the view component.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    DrawingMethod
    Type of drawn of a polyline-type figures.
    ViewComponentChangeEvent.Type
    Types of events for a change in the view component.
